action.reasoning: Observation: Training failed immediately with URLError (name resolution failure) due to attempting to download ResNet18 pretrained weights; network is disabled per environment spec. No training or eval occurred. Analysis: Pretrained=True is incompatible here (even listed pretrained models risk cache misses). The pipeline structure (WeightedRandomSampler for long-tail, CIFAR-adapted ResNet, metrics.jsonl logging, predict contract) is sound but must init model without downloads. Val acc logging and single-image predict are secondary issues. Decision: Update model.py to pretrained=False (from-scratch ResNet18 ~11M params), adjust train.py to SGD+lr=0.1+momentum (better for scratch training on CIFAR) + simple scheduler, refactor predict.py to batched inference for speed, train 5 epochs for baseline+timing, then submit_eval immediately.
